falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any daily session
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 low held at 4,800; breaking below it confirms this is not that pattern and the UNKNOWN/HOLD verdict was wrong to hesitate

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A BLOWOFF SCORE of 40 suggests controlled stress; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic regime, proving the current signal underestimated systemic risk and the HOLD was incorrect

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 is down >2% same day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This flight-to-safety divergence invalidates the pattern match because August 2024 bottom saw yields rise with stocks (growth scare); concurrent safe-haven bid proves this is a different macro regime entirely

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
